info.name: Facebook Business Manager Facebook Pages API

description.content:
Manage Facebook Pages, publish and manage posts, moderate comments, and track engagement through the Graph API. The Pages API allows businesses to programmatically manage their Facebook presence, publish content, respond to comments and messages, and retrieve page-level analytics.

Contact Support:
 Name: Meta Developer Support
